title: Memory exhaustion predicted — auth-service
summary: Memory usage on auth-service has been steadily increasing over the last 45 minutes. At the current trend it will exceed the container limit within 30 minutes.
suggestion: Proactively increase memory limit or restart the pod during a low-traffic window to reset memory state. Investigate for potential memory leak in session handling.

logs.message: Memory usage trending upward — 63% and rising
Session cache size increased by 18% in last 15 minutes

title: CPU saturation predicted — payment-api
summary: CPU usage on payment-api has spiked following the memory incident. At current load the service will saturate CPU within 15 minutes causing request timeouts.
suggestion: Scale the payment-api deployment to 2 replicas immediately to distribute load. Investigate the root cause of the increased CPU demand post-restart.

logs.message: Request queue growing — average response time 850ms
